title: 6 tar and OpenSSL Commands for Safer Archive Verification
summary: Package handoff files more safely with tar and OpenSSL commands for archive creation, content checks, and checksum verification.

test_environment.runtime: POSIX shell with tar and openssl

verification_setup: Confirm tar and openssl are installed.
Replace the example directories, file names, and exclusions before running the commands.
Create sample folders and disposable archive files for testing.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/tar_and_openssl_commands_for_safer_archive_verification.sh with local files and folders.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Spot-checked locally with disposable folders and archive files covering creation, exclusion, checksum output, extraction, and digest comparison. Run extraction examples from a writable working directory.
